name: Voice Message
description: A message bubble for voice/audio messages. Displays a play/pause control, a waveform visualization, duration, and optionally an AI-generated transcript that can be viewed, expanded, or hidden.

tokens.width: fit content / fill parent (ask for container width behavior)

button.spec: Google Sans Text Medium, 14/20, tracking 0 — for View/Hide transcript button

title.spec: Google Sans Text Medium, 16/24, tracking 0 — for transcript expanded title

transcript.spec: Google Sans Text Regular, 16/24, tracking 0 — for transcript body text

variants.name: w/o transcription — Default (xMS / xMS alt / RCS, Incoming / Outgoing)
variants.desc: Compact pill-shaped bubble with just the play button, waveform, and duration (e.g. 00:05). No transcript button, no expanded content.

variants.name: w/o transcription — Playing
variants.desc: Same compact layout but the play button becomes a pause button (togglable icon). Duration updates to current playback time (e.g. 00:09).

variants.name: w/transcription — Default
variants.desc: Adds a 'View transcript' button above the play controls. Tapping it expands the bubble to show the transcript. Duration shown (00:05).

variants.name: w/transcription — Playing
variants.desc: Same as w/transcription Default but the button toggles to pause state and duration shows playback progress (00:09).

variants.name: w/transcription expanded — Playing
variants.desc: Transcript fully expanded: shows a 'Hide transcript' button with a settings icon at the top, then a title line, then the full transcript body text, then the waveform/play controls at the bottom. Only appears in the Playing status (the transcript is shown while audio plays).

behavior.interactive: Tap play button to start/pause playback. Tap 'View transcript' to expand the bubble and reveal the AI-generated transcript. Tap 'Hide transcript' to collapse back to the compact view. In expanded state, the settings icon opens transcript preferences (language, style, etc.).
behavior.dynamic: Waveform fills from left to right as audio plays. Duration counter updates in real time. Play icon toggles between play_arrow and pause Material Symbols based on Status.
behavior.readReceipt: Visible only when Service=RCS AND Chat=Outgoing. Positioned at the bottom-right corner of the bubble.

states: Play button visible, waveform fully unplayed color, duration shows total length (00:05).
Pause button visible, waveform partially filled with played color, duration shows elapsed time (00:09).
Standard M3 state layer (10% opacity) on the button.
Bubble height grows to fit transcript content. Transition from compact to expanded uses standard M3 easing.

darkMode.notes: Bubble surface swaps between light/dark surface tokens. RCS outgoing bubble uses the primary color which inverts (dark blue → light blue) between modes, and text colors invert accordingly.

writing: Always 'View transcript' (sentence case). Label Large 14/20 Medium.
Always 'Hide transcript'. Same typography as View.
MM:SS with leading zeros (e.g. 00:05, 01:23). Displayed in Label Large 14/20 Medium.
AI-generated short summary (e.g. 'Dinner plans'). Title Medium 16/24 Medium. Max 1 line, ellipsis.
Full transcription text. Body Large 16/24 Regular. No truncation when expanded.
a11y: aria-label: 'Play voice message' / 'Pause voice message' based on Status
aria-hidden='true' (decorative); total duration announced via time element
Transcript content in expanded state should be aria-live='polite' for screen readers
WCAG 2.1 AA (4.5:1) for text, 3:1 for waveform and icon elements
Tab to focus play button → transcript button → settings. Space/Enter to activate. Arrow keys can scrub playback position (optional).
assets: Visual representation of audio amplitude. Generated from the audio file.
